name: cancel_order
description: Cancel an existing order by permanently deleting the child profile from the database. The user must provide their order ID which starts with 'OUM' followed by 8 digits (e.g. OUM12345678). Confirm with the user before calling this tool, as this action cannot be undone.

query_params_schema.description:
The order ID of the order to cancel and delete.
It starts with 'OUM' followed by 8 digits (e.g. OUM12345678).
This field is required.
